commit_scope: Add a bounded Adam-style optimizer step cell floor.

commands: coord claim adam-step-cell-floor "Next model-kernel wall after autodiff-gradient-cell: add bounded Adam/moment update cell receipts that consume gradient vectors from optimizer/autodiff floors; avoid tensor autodiff, live mesh transport, durable eval query, payload merkle proof, privacy/conflict, router/audio, and BML compiler lanes."
cd form && ./validate.sh form-stdlib/core.fk form-stdlib/model-vitality.fk form-stdlib/optimizer-step.fk form-stdlib/autodiff-gradient.fk form-stdlib/tests/adam-step-cell-band.fk
local_validation.notes: Focused validate returned `core.fk+model-vitality.fk+optimizer-step.fk+autodiff-gradient.fk+adam-step-cell-band.fk -> 4095` with `fourth arm: 1 band(s) four-way` and `1 ok, 0 divergent`. The fourth-arm gate returned `PASS-4WAY adam-step-cell`.

ci_validation.notes: No push or PR yet for this lane.

deploy_validation.summary: No deploy requested; this is a local Form runtime floor.

e2e_validation.expected_behavior_delta: Form-native model kernels now have bounded Adam-style first/second moment receipts with integer square-root denominator and scalar autodiff gradient-vector handoff.
test_flows: cd form && ./validate.sh form-stdlib/core.fk form-stdlib/model-vitality.fk form-stdlib/optimizer-step.fk form-stdlib/autodiff-gradient.fk form-stdlib/tests/adam-step-cell-band.fk

phase_gate.gate: A bounded optimizer moment cell must exist before tensor-scale training loops can claim Adam-style optimizer state as first-class Form-native model-kernel status.
phase_gate.next: Add tensor autodiff gradient cells, production Adam bias correction, live chunk payload merkle proof, mesh transport, durable eval query, and privacy/conflict receipts as separate bounded lanes.

floor_update.previous_observed_floor: SGD/momentum and scalar autodiff gradient cells existed, while Adam optimizer cells remained a named next wall.
floor_update.current_observed_floor: adam-step-cell returns 4095 four-way and is admitted to form/fourth-arm-bands.txt.
not_claimed: chunk-range payload merkle proof over a live carrier
